title: Xtra Gooey American Pork Casserole
description: A hearty, comforting dish featuring tender pork, sweet cranberries, and a rich, gooey sauce, perfect for a lazy Sunday afternoon.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large Dutch oven, brown the pork cubes over medium-high heat until browned on all sides.
Add the chopped onion to the pot and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute, until fragrant.
In a small bowl, whisk together the cranberry sauce, ketchup, brown sugar, smoked paprika, black pepper, and salt.
Pour the sauce mixture over the pork and onions, stirring to combine.
Cover the pot and transfer to the preheated oven, braising for 2 1/2 hours, or until the pork is tender.
Remove the pot from the oven and stir in the shredded cheddar cheese until melted and gooey.
Return the pot to the oven and bake for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the casserole is heated through.
